title: 断航故土
scope: project-level regional color system for first-season route and major future-facing regions

continuity_locks: Regional color is not a full-scene LUT; it is a local material, power overlay, and story-memory system.
Suming/Qingming overlay may enter every region, but it must not erase local regional identity.
Zhaoming colors must appear worn, hidden, cracked, wet, or partially covered, not as flawless restoration imagery.
Human clothing can be old, cold, soot-marked, or repaired, but must retain profession and role identity.
Low-magic colors are brief localized clues, never combat spell spectacle.

regions.narrative_function: 可被夺走的小家；农猎生活秩序被清明制度切开。

primary.usage: 土墙、村道、门槛、旧井边泥土
黄昏、麦束、晒谷场、残阳边缘

secondary.usage: 罗家药屋、药篮、沈家生活锚点

power_overlay.usage: 封门牌、虫蜡针、白册边缘
螳刃小兵局部甲壳、门口剪影

accents.usage: 井口、水面、玉片未命名反光
第02集火场、焦痕衣角、灰烬边缘

regions.lighting: 黄昏侧逆光，室内木色压暗；清明香进入时用冷白细线压低本地暖土色。
camera_rules: Use the old well, medicine cabinet, bow rack, and threshold as stable vertical anchors.
After the fire, keep recognizable silhouettes of the original home space.
The sunset should rim objects, not turn the village into idyllic golden farmland.

regions.narrative_function: 文明被保留为生产工具；水路开阔感与征粮控制并存。

primary.usage: 河面、河雾阴影、水标倒影

power_overlay.usage: 征粮木牌、粮袋标签、检查口
轴承、磨平接口、地窖机械阴影

accents.usage: 被磨平炮架刻度、旧水标残痕
半枚驿令与旧水标短促共鸣

regions.lighting: 河雾漫反射与蒸汽白低光；齿轮和手部必须从蒸汽中可读。
camera_rules: Use piers, low chimneys, waterwheels, and granary doors to preserve vertical pressure in 9:16.
Steam must be translucent enough to reveal production control details.
Gold comes from grain, wet wood, and old copper, not luxury shine.

regions.narrative_function: 旧帝国议会大厦被清明制度接管；威严旧建筑外壳内长出虫蜡、蜂巢与洁净制度暴力。

primary.usage: 覆盖旧议会墙面、封条、针具托盘、走廊反光、膜帘
旧议会桌面、门洞、识别环、儿童白衣、蜂巢壁龛

secondary.usage: 旧白石地砖、灯槽、白册阴影、议会穹顶冷反光
官制小钉、边角金属、白翳高阶标识

power_overlay.usage: 白翅覆黑日徽记、册封印、主厅墙心、门心
门卫复眼、护颚、刃肢局部

accents.usage: 验血、血纹、白册边缘极小痕迹
清明香、虫蜡针反光、记忆室冷光

regions.lighting: 冷白顶光、硬边阴影、无尘长廊反光；少量血色越少越刺眼。
regions.architectural_origin: 昭明旧帝国议会大厦；外观和主厅仍保留高大威严的旧议会轴线、白石柱列和大厅尺度。
regions.insectoid_conversion: 肃明/清明改造集中在内部表皮：虫蜡白膜、蜂巢孔壁龛、半透明虫膜帘、白册架、虫蜡针具、黑日权力标记。
camera_rules: Preserve the grand imperial council axis and high hall scale, then show insect-wax and honeycomb conversion inside that old shell.
Compress characters with high white-stone walls, old council columns, honeycomb niches, repeated white doorways, and top-down light.
Keep human identity colors visible but desaturated under the institutional white.
Bai Yi carries this palette into other regions as an inserted power slice.
Honeycomb cells, insect-wax membrane curtains, blank registries, and tool closeups may form a production-board collage, but must not contain readable inscriptions.
forbidden: erasing all old imperial council architecture

regions.narrative_function: 旧帝国工程、防灾防线和肃明牢笼叠合。

primary.usage: 城墙、锁喉关、寒鸦堡外墙
墙顶雪、风雪反光、雪泥高光

secondary.usage: 山体阴影、夜雪、远墙层次
城门、骨钟钩、旧甲片、兵器

power_overlay.usage: 粮仓封条、肃明军令、虫蜡覆盖层

accents.usage: 撞击坑、旧伤布、墙缝血痕
剥落处露出的旧日月阵基

regions.lighting: 雪面冷反光、墙体深阴影、夜战时火光只低量照出裂纹和骨钟。
camera_rules: Make wall surfaces rise through the vertical frame to keep humans small.
Use giant-beast pressure through shadow, horn shape, cracks, and falling snow dust.
Gold-red array light appears only where the overlay has peeled away.

regions.narrative_function: 敌人也是寒灾中的活人；不是纯白雪原也不是怪物潮。

primary.usage: 草原、帐外干草、迁徙车辙边缘
冻裂地、雪下土、荒原阴影

secondary.usage: 秃山、兽皮、木桩、骨笛谷岩面
冰湖、寒风边缘、雪坑冷光

accents.usage: 北境营火、萨满火、雪坑救援
血誓绳结、骨笛刻痕、战鼓旧染

regions.lighting: 干冷天光、低矮营火、风蚀阴影；暴雪是天气层而不是唯一底色。
camera_rules: Use migration tracks, low fire, bone markers, and distant beast silhouettes as readable story anchors.
Keep Luming's bone and hide palette distinct from border-wall gray.
Treat ice-blue fire as survival light, not attack magic.

regions.narrative_function: 被保存、被伪装、也背负旧债的文明残片；第二季接口。

primary.usage: 密室墙、旧臣馆署、驿图压石
封存旗匣、旧屏风、南方暗火边缘

secondary.usage: 旧帝国织物、晏南枝身份记忆、卷轴绳
玉片、月下旧印、潮湿石面反光
隐歌谷、藤桥、药包外层、庇护线索

power_overlay.usage: 日月纹、星图铜线、旧礼器边角
密室桌、药包底、木匣、暗格

accents.usage: 第01集南方密室火星、被盖住的起事暗流

regions.lighting: 潮湿低暖火、密林冷绿反光、月白石面短反射；华丽必须有裂纹和潮气。
camera_rules: Use preserved traces and hidden compartments instead of flawless palace space.
Do not allow vermilion and sapphire blue to cover the whole frame at once.
Increase southern imperial color only when the story moves toward Hidden Song Valley.

regions.lighting: 灰黑底色中只留少量塌顶冷光和月白星图残光。
camera_rules: Use burnt shelves, star-map fragments, and child silhouettes as local anchors.
Keep the scene about lost history, not horror-dungeon spectacle.

regions.narrative_function: 无姓人与混裔的生活秩序；正统叙事被质疑。

accents.usage: 混裔护符、隐藏身份线索

regions.lighting: 墙根阴影、火盆低暖和灰蓝棚布冷光混杂。
camera_rules: Keep the market crowded through fixed stalls and narrow lanes rather than large extras.
Make the palette mixed but organized, matching the social mixture.
Sun-and-moon colors should appear faded, torn, or traded.

secondary.usage: 月下石台、玉片反光、湿苔冷光

accents.usage: 盟书石刻与旧墨综合色

regions.lighting: 火把低暖、月白冷反光和墙脚金赤断线并存，但都必须微弱。
camera_rules: Keep the relay tunnel practical and narrow, not a magical palace.
Use broken lines along the wall base and floor rather than full glowing arrays.
Multispecies marks should look worn into stone, not colorful alliance badges.

route_progression.color_shift: 土褐/麦金被虫蜡白与火场暗红切开，转入旧白石和金赤断纹
route_progression.emotional_shift: 小家被毁，旧路被迫开启

route_progression.color_shift: 河青、蒸汽白、油黑和粮牌黄替代火场红
route_progression.emotional_shift: 发现文明被选择性保留

route_progression.color_shift: 焦黑、书灰、裂铜、月白残光
虫蜡白、骨白、黑日、干血红极小点
route_progression.emotional_shift: 制度暴力直接压到亲人

route_progression.color_shift: 灰蓝、陶土、旧布黄、碎陶色
route_progression.emotional_shift: 正统叙事被无姓人质疑

route_progression.color_shift: 黑石、雪白、阴影蓝、旧铁、冷蜡白
枯草黄、冻土灰、骨白、冰蓝火
月白、金赤断线、雪泥黑、旧旗暗红
route_progression.emotional_shift: 血统旗帜让位于活人承诺

route_progression.color_shift: 藤绿、旧白石、朱赤旧漆、宝蓝、月白

handoff.prompt_room_rule: Write regional palette as local base color + power overlay + old memory accent + forbidden list, not as loose color names.
